# NovaChat

> NovaChat is a modern real-time messaging app with friend codes, typing indicators, read receipts, and a built-in AI assistant powered by Gemini.

NovaChat lets people connect through unique friend codes, exchange real-time 1:1 messages, and chat with a private AI assistant — all in one beautiful, fast interface.

## Pages

- [Sign in](/auth): Sign in or create a NovaChat account.
